Calculators & Text Tools

Simple, lightweight, instant utilities for calculating standard equations and manipulating text.

Age Calculator

Find out your exact age down to the days based on your date of birth instantly.

Percentage Calculator

Calculate precise percentage differences, margins, and ratios.

Word Counter

Count total words, characters, and spaces in any pasted block of text.
